meta.caption:
My couch looked OLD. I fixed it for under $80. No new couch needed.

Here's exactly what I used:
1. Mamma Mia Sofa Cover — $39 (universal fit, 30+ colors)
2. Mamma Mia Cushion Covers (set of 4) — $28
3. Mamma Mia Armchair Cover — $24

Total: $91. Looks like a $2,000 couch now. The before and after is insane.

Link in bio to shop Mamma Mia Covers.

#sofamakeover #couchmakeover #homedecoronabudget #amazonfinds #livingroominspo

meta.caption:
I was sleeping wrong for 30 years. This pillow changed everything.

Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Pillow — $99 (was $150). Adjustable fill, cooling cover, proper neck alignment for side sleepers. 4.8 stars from 2,400+ reviews. Made in USA.

Also grabbed their Weighted Blanket — $149. Cotton + bamboo blend, breathable and calming.

Wake up with neck pain? This is the fix. Link in bio.

#sidesleeper #pillowreview #bettersleep #bedroommakeover #sleephacks
